title: Asphodeline szovitsii
taxonomy: Asphodeline szovitsii is classified within the family Asphodelaceae, commonly known as the asphodel family. This family consists of about 300 species of flowering plants, and Asphodeline szovitsii is a part of the subfamily Asphodeloideae. The genus Asphodeline is further divided into several species, including Asphodeline szovitsii, which is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. Asphodeline szovitsii is a perennial plant that belongs to the order Asparagales, a group of flowering plants that also includes lilies, orchids, and hyacinths. The classification of Asphodeline szovitsii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.

parts: Asphodeline szovitsii is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues. The roots of the Asphodeline szovitsii plant are considered the most valuable part for medicinal purposes. The roots are traditionally used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs, and are often consumed as a tea or used in a decoction.
